attributes.description: Alerts when the Envoy downstream error rate across HTTP stat_prefixes exceeds 5% over 15 minutes. Errors at the edge indicate client-visible failures.
attributes.name: [Envoy OTel] High downstream error rate

investigation_guide.blob:
## Envoy high downstream error rate

### What fired
`(downstream_rq_completed - downstream_rq_2xx) / downstream_rq_completed > 5%` across HTTP stat_prefixes.

### Why it matters
Downstream errors include 4xx and 5xx seen by clients. Sustained elevated rates degrade user experience and are almost always caused by upstream application issues or Envoy config problems.

### Triage
1. Split errors by stat_prefix (ingress_http vs admin) to localise the incident.
2. On the Downstream dashboard, correlate with upstream cluster health and 5xx ratios.
3. Inspect `envoy.cluster_manager.warming_clusters` and config state.

### Remediation
- Roll back the latest application or config change.
- Add retries / circuit breaking on the misbehaving upstream.

### Tuning
- 5% over 15 minutes; tighten to 1% for SLA-critical tiers.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
// Aggregate across HTTP stat_prefixes (ingress_http, admin) — add more COALESCE terms as needed
| EVAL total_rq = COALESCE(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed, 0::long)
    + COALESCE(envoy.http.admin.downstream_rq_completed, 0::long)
| EVAL success_rq = COALESCE(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx, 0::long)
    + COALESCE(envoy.http.admin.downstream_rq_2xx, 0::long)
| WHERE total_rq > 50
| EVAL error_rate = TO_DOUBLE(total_rq - success_rq) / TO_DOUBLE(total_rq) * 100.0
| STATS max_error_rate = MAX(error_rate)
// Healthy: < 1%; Unhealthy: > 5%. Adjust threshold for your SLO.
| WHERE max_error_rate > 5.0
